summary: Comprehensive testing of Quizz+ MVP completed successfully. Backend APIs (100% success rate), frontend UI components, PWA features, mobile responsiveness, and design compliance all verified. 17 pages implemented with full quiz system, leaderboard, profile, badges, and proper authentication flow.

performance_notes: Initial database was empty - seeded with demo data for proper testing

design_issues.issue: Onboarding navigation may need improvement for multi-slide experience

passed_tests: Backend API authentication (registration, login, OAuth session exchange)
All protected endpoints (themes, quiz, profile, leaderboard, notifications)
Quiz game flow (question loading, answer submission, scoring)
Dashboard components (user greeting, score card, fun facts, daily quiz)
Color palette compliance (#1B2042 bg, #C9A84C gold, #FF6B35 CTA, #F5EFD9 text)
Glass cards UI effect (13 elements found)
PWA manifest and service worker registration
Profile page with stats and badges display

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor onboarding improvement needed)
success_percentage.design: 98% (correct color palette, mobile responsive, PWA compliant)
